textPlain: Ok so what is this publication? Because apparently they’ve been around since the 90s. I’ve never heard of them though. Their title and its reference suggests a very strong philosophical stance about something and I imagine that because of that they have political leanings, but I can’t tell what their leanings are
Aravind Narayanan seems to be the only guy qualified enough to be called an expert.

The four books discussed in that passage are:AI Snake Oil – by Arvind Narayanan and Sayash KapoorNexus – by Yuval Noah HarariGenesis – by Henry Kissinger, Craig Mundie, and Eric SchmidtThe Singularity Is Nearer – by Ray Kurzweil
